metadata.description: A decision-quality engine: explore, stress-test through a five-advisor panel, pass a Decision Gate of verifiable checks, and decide.

plugins.name: crucible
plugins.description: Brainstorm ideas into clear briefs, stress-test each through a five-advisor panel, visualize the thinking, and compare verdicts so you decide. Includes the crucible orchestrator, the deliberation panel, and the visualize skill.
